title: audit — Eloquent observers
description: owen-it handles the actual model observation via its Auditable trait. Our observer is on the Audit model itself — KMS encrypt + hash chain + event fan-out.

handles: creating → resolve tenant_id from TenancyResolver if not set + populate ULID prefix `aud_`
creating → for each key in $auditEncrypted on the auditable model, KMS-encrypt old_values[key] + new_values[key] via EncryptedAuditValueCast + set is_encrypted=true

creating → if audit.tamper_evident_chain feature on for the tenant: look up latest audit row for tenant → set previous_hash = that row's row_hash → compute row_hash = SHA-256(canonical serialisation of this row) → write both
